warm_up: Review top error from last session: gender.
focus: Accusative article agreement for the three main genders: practice 'einen' (masc.), 'eine' (fem.), 'ein' (neut.) in short shopping dialogues until the forms feel automatic.
speaking_prompt: You're on the street near the Stephansdom and you're not sure which way to walk. Ask Stefan how to get to the Belvedere. He'll tell you — confirm you understood the route.
